GET /v1/accounts/{account}/operator-stat.truth_boundary: Account operator-status is a derived readiness/responsibility read model. It is not validator promotion, not proof of public validator readiness, and grants no authority.

GET /v1/accounts/{account}/profile.truth_boundary: Public profile is a derived/indexed read model over committed public profile, content, and social state. It must not expose raw PoH identity evidence, session keys, device fingerprints, or recovery secrets.

GET /v1/activity/notices.truth_boundary: Activity notices is derived only from publicly inspectable protocol events: mentions, replies, group invitations, moderation notices, dispute assignments, governance notices, and validator/operator alerts.

GET /v1/dev/bootstrap-secret.truth_boundary: Developer bootstrap secret route is local/rehearsal gated by runtime posture and must not be treated as a public production secret surface.

GET /v1/feed.truth_boundary: Public feed returns visible public posts only; default recency remains legacy-compatible while optional ranked modes use deterministic score/nonce/id cursors.

GET /v1/groups/{group_id}/governance-con.truth_boundary: Group governance contract is a public derived/indexed read model over committed group state. It explains group-scope governance/public-read/action-gate boundaries and grants no authority.

GET /v1/metrics.truth_boundary: Metrics exposure is deployment-gated and not a generic public read surface.

GET /v1/net/peers.error_model: 404 debug_disabled or route-specific network diagnostic error
GET /v1/net/peers.truth_boundary: Network peer diagnostics are not generic public state snapshots.

GET /v1/net/relay/fetch.truth_boundary: Relay fetch is a node/observer transport queue read with route-specific authority and cursor/replay semantics, not generic public state.

GET /v1/net/relay/status.truth_boundary: Relay status is a transport diagnostic and grants no observer, validator, or consensus authority.

GET /v1/observer/edge/status.truth_boundary: Observer edge status is diagnostic posture/status for the observer edge path and grants no validator or mutation authority.

GET /v1/poh/async/case/{case_id}.truth_boundary: Async PoH case reads are public commitment read models with restricted identity evidence included only for authorized applicant or assigned reviewer sessions.

GET /v1/poh/async/juror-cases.truth_boundary: Async PoH juror-cases is reviewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/poh/async/my-cases.truth_boundary: Async PoH my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/poh/live/assigned.truth_boundary: Live assigned cases are reviewer-scoped queue reads, not generic public snapshots.

GET /v1/poh/live/case/{case_id}.truth_boundary: Live PoH case reads expose commitment/status metadata only and must not expose raw room URLs, raw media, or restricted identity evidence.

GET /v1/poh/live/juror-cases.truth_boundary: Live juror-cases is a reviewer-scoped alias and requires authenticated viewer alignment.

GET /v1/poh/live/my-cases.truth_boundary: Live my-cases is account-scoped and requires authenticated viewer alignment.

GET /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}.truth_boundary: Live session reads expose chain-derived commitments only. They never return raw relay URLs or authority to join as a participant.

GET /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}/pa.truth_boundary: Live participants read exposes chain-derived participant status only and no media/signaling secrets.

GET /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}/pr.truth_boundary: Live presence is node-local transport-only data and is participant-scoped; chain authority still comes from signed attendance/verdict/finalize txs.

GET /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}/we.truth_boundary: WebRTC signal reads are live-session participant scoped and must not be indexed as generic public snapshots.

GET /v1/poh/live/sessions.truth_boundary: Live session list exposes commitment/status metadata only and does not grant room participation authority.

GET /v1/poh/live/webrtc/relay-config.truth_boundary: Relay config may expose non-secret connection hints only. It does not grant signaling, room, reviewer, or consensus authority.

GET /v1/poh/live/webrtc/signals/diagnost.truth_boundary: WebRTC diagnostics are operator-gated transport diagnostics and must not be indexed as public read snapshots.

GET /v1/poh/tier2/case/{case_id}.truth_boundary: Tier-2 PoH case reads may include sensitive evidence/status fields and must be treated as session-aware redacted case reads, not generic public snapshots.

GET /v1/poh/tier2/juror-cases.truth_boundary: Tier-2 juror-cases is reviewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/poh/tier2/my-cases.truth_boundary: Tier-2 my-cases is viewer-scoped and requires a valid account session.

GET /v1/reviewer/artifacts.truth_boundary: Reviewer artifacts are disabled unless WEALL_REVIEWER_ARTIFACTS_ENABLED and artifact directory are explicitly configured.

GET /v1/reviewer/artifacts/bundle.truth_boundary: Disposable reviewer bundle read only; not canonical production authority.

GET /v1/reviewer/artifacts/manifest.truth_boundary: Disposable reviewer manifest read only; not canonical production authority.

GET /v1/session/me.truth_boundary: Returns unauthenticated diagnostic status when headers are absent and scoped session status only when valid session headers are present; not a generic state snapshot.

GET /v1/status.truth_boundary: Status exposes the active/target signature profile and ML-DSA verifier availability for observer review only; it grants no validator authority and does not claim completed production cryptographic audit, public beta, mainnet, live economics, or public multi-validator BFT readiness.

GET /v1/status/launch-matrix.truth_boundary: Read-only public launch capability matrix; does not activate or disable consensus rules by itself.

GET /v1/status/operator.truth_boundary: Operator status is diagnostic posture evidence and must not be treated as authority-granting.

GET /v1/status/testnet-capabilities.truth_boundary: Testnet capability status is a launch-matrix-bound claim-control surface. It reports completed mechanisms and disabled high-risk capabilities but grants no validator, economic, helper, upgrade, legal, or public beta authority.

POST /v1/accounts/tx/profile-update.truth_boundary: Builds an unsigned PROFILE_UPDATE transaction skeleton only. Profile metadata becomes public protocol state only after signed submission, consensus commit, and receipt/status inspection.

POST /v1/net/relay/ack.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; 404 relay_disabled; 400 invalid relay ack; 403 unauthorized relay ack
POST /v1/net/relay/ack.truth_boundary: Relay ACK is transport-only queue mutation and requires signed recipient authorization in production.

POST /v1/net/relay/fetch.truth_boundary: Relay fetch POST is a node/observer transport queue interaction with route-specific authority and replay/cursor semantics.

POST /v1/net/relay/submit.truth_boundary: Relay submit stores transport envelopes only. It does not submit chain transactions or grant consensus authority.

POST /v1/observer/edge/reconcile/{tx_id}.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; operator token/observer edge route-specific failures
POST /v1/observer/edge/reconcile/{tx_id}.truth_boundary: Observer reconcile is transport/status bookkeeping and grants no validator authority.

POST /v1/observer/edge/tx-queue/drain.error_model: standard_api_error_envelope; operator token/observer edge route-specific failures
POST /v1/observer/edge/tx-queue/drain.truth_boundary: Observer tx queue drain is operator/observer transport handling and grants no block production or validation authority.

POST /v1/poh/async/evidence/video/upload.truth_boundary: Async PoH video upload is an env-gated intake helper. It returns a CID/commitment but does not verify humanity, sign transactions, or write consensus state.

POST /v1/poh/async/tx/juror-accept.truth_boundary: PoH async juror accept skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/async/tx/juror-decline.truth_boundary: PoH async juror decline skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/async/tx/review.truth_boundary: PoH async review skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/challenge/tx/open.truth_boundary: Returns a POH_CHALLENGE_OPEN tx skeleton only. Clients must sign and submit through /v1/tx/submit; the skeleton route grants no PoH status or system authority.

POST /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}/p.truth_boundary: Presence updates are participant-scoped transport hints only and do not create attendance, verdict, or finalization authority.

POST /v1/poh/live/session/{session_id}/w.truth_boundary: WebRTC signal writes are participant-scoped transport messages, not public state mutations.
Bridge imports are cross-node rehearsal transport records; not a public write surface.

POST /v1/poh/live/tx/attendance.truth_boundary: PoH Live attendance skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/live/tx/juror-accept.truth_boundary: PoH Live juror accept skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/live/tx/juror-decline.truth_boundary: PoH Live juror decline skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/live/tx/request.truth_boundary: PoH Live request skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/live/tx/verdict.truth_boundary: PoH Live verdict skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/live/webrtc/signals/queue/d.truth_boundary: WebRTC tx queue drain is operator-gated transport queue handling, not public state and not consensus mutation.

POST /v1/poh/operator/live/finalize.error_model: 404 operator_poh_disabled unless WEALL_ENABLE_OPERATOR_POH=true; 403 operator_token_required/operator_token_invalid unless X-WeAll-Operator-Token matches; standard_api_error_envelope for bad request
POST /v1/poh/operator/live/finalize.rate_limit_policy: global_api_rate_limit_and_request_size_middleware; operator token and env gate required before enqueue
POST /v1/poh/operator/live/finalize.truth_boundary: PoH operator routes are environment-disabled and operator-token gated. They enqueue deterministic system txs only and do not grant public validator authority, public PoH finalization authority, or decentralized reviewer consensus by themselves.

POST /v1/poh/operator/live/init.error_model: 404 operator_poh_disabled unless WEALL_ENABLE_OPERATOR_POH=true; 403 operator_token_required/operator_token_invalid unless X-WeAll-Operator-Token matches; standard_api_error_envelope for bad request
POST /v1/poh/operator/live/init.rate_limit_policy: global_api_rate_limit_and_request_size_middleware; operator token and env gate required before enqueue
POST /v1/poh/operator/live/init.truth_boundary: PoH operator routes are environment-disabled and operator-token gated. They enqueue deterministic system txs only and do not grant public validator authority, public PoH finalization authority, or decentralized reviewer consensus by themselves.

POST /v1/poh/operator/tier2/finalize.error_model: 404 operator_poh_disabled unless WEALL_ENABLE_OPERATOR_POH=true; 403 operator_token_required/operator_token_invalid unless X-WeAll-Operator-Token matches; standard_api_error_envelope for bad request
POST /v1/poh/operator/tier2/finalize.rate_limit_policy: global_api_rate_limit_and_request_size_middleware; operator token and env gate required before enqueue
POST /v1/poh/operator/tier2/finalize.truth_boundary: PoH operator routes are environment-disabled and operator-token gated. They enqueue deterministic system txs only and do not grant public validator authority, public PoH finalization authority, or decentralized reviewer consensus by themselves.

POST /v1/poh/tier2/tx/request.truth_boundary: PoH Tier-2 request skeleton helper does not mutate consensus state; final authority is signed tx admission/apply.

POST /v1/poh/tier2/video/upload.truth_boundary: Tier-2 PoH video upload is an env-gated intake helper. It returns a CID/commitment but does not verify humanity, sign transactions, or write consensus state.

POST /v1/session/create.truth_boundary: Session create is a local/dev rehearsal helper guarded by runtime profile isolation and must not be classified as a production public write.

POST /v1/session/login.truth_boundary: Session login creates backend-recognized session material only after signed account-key proof and runtime direct-session gate. It is not a generic public write route.

truth_boundary: Sidecar metadata overrides static heuristics for public-readiness API inventory. Runtime route code remains authoritative for enforcement.
